name: applycairn
description: An immersive, local-first job-search ecosystem with guided onboarding, dashboards, discovery, applications, tracking, and interviews

interface.shortDescription: Run your complete job search from one private workspace.
interface.longDescription: Start with an interactive resume intake, search one role or many, inspect evidence-backed scores in a dashboard, track applications, research companies and public contacts, reconcile replies, and prepare for interviews.
